word.title: JSON Schema for the Concept of Image Validation Scripts
word.name: JSON Schema for the concept of image validation scripts
word.description: This is the JSON Schema for elements of the concept of image validation scripts. Every element of this concept must validate against this JSON schema.

imageValidationScript.name: image validation script
imageValidationScript.title: Image Validation Script
imageValidationScript.description: data about this image validation script

slug.name: slug
slug.title: Slug
slug.description: Unique identifier for this validation script

tool.name: tool
tool.title: Tool
tool.description: Name of the external validation tool

toolVersion.name: tool version
toolVersion.title: Tool Version
toolVersion.description: Version of the tool this script was tested against

command.name: command
command.title: Command
command.description: The command template to run, with <file> as placeholder for the file path

installCommand.name: install command
installCommand.title: Install Command
installCommand.description: How to install the validation tool

path.name: path
path.title: Path
path.description: Absolute path to the tool binary

successExitCode.name: success exit code
successExitCode.title: Success Exit Code
successExitCode.description: The exit code that indicates a valid file (typically 0)

description.name: description
description.title: Description
description.description: Description of what the tool checks
